description: Tests that cannot be automated due to Salesforce SSO or external system dependencies
reason: Salesforce SSO authentication is not supported in headless/automated browser runs. These tests require manual SSO login to Salesforce which cannot be scripted.

tests.title: Salesforce Clone and Create Order for all countries
Search CPQ orders in Order Engine
Test 459524: OE not retrieving Cases, Opportunities, Contacts from Salesforce
tests.reason: Requires Salesforce SSO login + SF_CASE_KEYWORD, SF_OPPORTUNITY_KEYWORD, SF_CONTACT_KEYWORD env vars with live Salesforce data

tests.title: Test 460660 Step 3: Header UDF tab after Salesforce UDF removal
tests.reason: Requires manual Salesforce config change to remove Header UDFs for account 51005253

impact: These 5 tests were previously scheduled across 6 countries = 24 skipped slots removed from the suite
